education.degree: B.S. in Electronic Systems Engineering  |  3.4 GPA
education.description: Focused on Embedded Design, Power Systems, Microcontrollers, and Software Development.

leadership.organization: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE-TAMU)
leadership.description:
• Applied workshop-taught skills in Keil µVision (firmware development) and KiCad (schematic/PCB layout) to personal projects, developing hardware and firmware integration expertise
• Participate in technical seminars, design competitions, and networking events to enhance collaborative troubleshooting and communicate design decisions, while expanding industry connections

leadership.role: Mentor, Former Special Events Planning Committee
leadership.description:
• Mentored 5 freshmen through academic, social, and organizational integration, supporting their first year at Texas A&M
• Helped coordinate event logistics and an $8,000 semester budget to plan and deliver high-quality engaging events for 96 peers

• Explore industrial distribution and supply chain principles, developing engineering problem-solving knowledge in logistics
• Engage in workshops, seminars, and networking events to broaden understanding of supply chain practices

projects.title: Smart Table Solutions
projects.description: Built STM32 BluePill-based smart standing desks, generating $2,400 in revenue. Developed motor control with optional add-ons. Designed modular PCB in KiCad
highlights: Designed & implemented STM32-based control systems for custom standing desks
Engineered modular PCBs in KiCad & verified circuitry with Multisim simulations
Integrated hardware & software for motorized lifts, LEDs, and height presets
Collaborated on Solid Edge CAD enclosures for manufacturable, scalable designs
Generated $2,400 in revenue from 8 local customers

projects.title: SoilSense
projects.description: Arduino Uno R3 irrigation controller using capacitive soil-moisture sensor. Integrated DC pump with N-MOSFET, LED indicators, and ultrasonic reservoir sensing for low-water alerts
highlights: Designed Arduino-based autonomous irrigation system achieving 9+ months of continuous operation
Engineered N-MOSFET pump control circuit with flyback protection and safety interlocks
Integrated capacitive soil moisture sensing with ultrasonic water level monitoring and RGB status indicators
Developed state machine logic with threshold-based decision making and cooldown periods

projects.title: Wi-Fi Desk Buddy
projects.description: Wi-Fi-synced LED clock on Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W using NTP for automatic time correction. Features 12/24-hour formats, RGB color control, and Pomodoro focus timer with visual alerts
highlights: Built Wi-Fi-enabled LED clock with automatic NTP time synchronization on Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W
Implemented dual time format display (12/24-hour) with customizable RGB color control
Developed Pomodoro timer with visual alerts for productivity and focus tracking
Programmed MicroPython firmware for wireless connectivity and real-time updates
